panels.title: Battery savings today (zeus — source of truth)

targets.query: from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -25h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "zeus_battery_savings_today" and r._field == "value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Net savings today"})

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -25h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "zeus_baseline_cost_today" and r._field == "value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Baseline cost today"})

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -25h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "zeus_actual_cost_today" and r._field == "value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Actual cost today"})

imp = from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -30m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_consumption_w" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
exp = from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -30m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_production_w" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
join(tables: {imp: imp, exp: exp}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value_imp - r._value_exp})) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Net grid (W)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "ap3002532000565690_battery_level" and r._field == "value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Battery SoC"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "current_electricity_market_price" and r._field == "value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Price now"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "current_percentage_of_highest_electricity_price" and r._field == "value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Price percentile"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
todayStart = date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d)
from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: todayStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_consumption_kwh" and r._field == "value") |> spread() |> rename(columns: {_value: "Grid import"})

import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Brussels")
todayStart = date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d)
from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: todayStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_production_kwh" and r._field == "value") |> spread() |> rename(columns: {_value: "Grid export"})

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -25h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "zeus_actual_cost_today" and r._field == "value") |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Grid cost today"})

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: -25h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "zeus_battery_savings_today" and r._field == "value") |> last() |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Net savings today"})

panels.title: Net signed grid power (W) — import + / export −

targets.query:
imp = from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_consumption_w" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
exp = from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_production_w" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
join(tables: {imp: imp, exp: exp}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value_imp - r._value_exp})) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Net grid (W)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_consumption_w" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Consumption (W)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "utility_room_home_energy_meter_electric_production_w" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Production (W)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "buzzbrick_ap3002532000565690_grid_input_power" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Grid input (W)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "buzzbrick_ap3002532000565690_alternating_current_out_power" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "AC output (W)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "current_electricity_market_price" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Current"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "next_hour_electricity_market_price" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Next hour"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Price percentile per hour (green = cheap, red = expensive)

targets.query:
pct = from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "current_percentage_of_highest_electricity_price" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
pct |> rename(columns: {_value: "Percentile"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "buzzbrick_charge_energy" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Charged (kWh)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id == "buzzbrick_discharge_energy" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "Discharged (kWh)"}) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Peak consumption — per-device power (W, stacked)
panels.description: What's drawing power right now / at the peak. Every per-device power (W) plug sensor (entity_id matching *_power), enumerated dynamically so new plugs appear automatically. Whole-home meter, Bluetti internal flows and zeus targets are excluded. Stacked so the contribution of each device to a spike is attributable.

targets.query: from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /_power$/) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id !~ /^zeus_/ and r.entity_id !~ /^buzzbrick_/ and r.entity_id !~ /net_power$/ and r.entity_id !~ /peak_power$/ and r.entity_id !~ /electric_consumption_w/ and r.entity_id !~ /electric_production_w/ and r.entity_id !~ /target_.*_power$/) |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> group(columns: ["entity_id"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "entity_id"]) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Peak consumption ranking — device max power over range (W)
panels.description: Ranks each per-device power (W) plug by its highest reading over the selected range, so the biggest contributor to peak consumption is obvious at a glance. Same dynamic set of *_power entities as the stacked breakdown above.

targets.query: from(bucket: "homeassistant") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id =~ /_power$/) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.entity_id !~ /^zeus_/ and r.entity_id !~ /^buzzbrick_/ and r.entity_id !~ /net_power$/ and r.entity_id !~ /peak_power$/ and r.entity_id !~ /electric_consumption_w/ and r.entity_id !~ /electric_production_w/ and r.entity_id !~ /target_.*_power$/) |> group(columns: ["entity_id"]) |> max() |> group() |> keep(columns: ["_value", "entity_id"]) |> rename(columns: {entity_id: "Device", _value: "Peak W"}) |> sort(columns: ["Peak W"], desc: true)
